name: Plush Embossed Baby Blanket Chevron - Cloud Island™ Gray - 100 Each
description:
Snuggle up with your baby with this Gray Chevron Plush Embossed Baby Blanket from Cloud Island™. Keep the blanket draped over your glider chair and use it as a nursing cover or just to wrap up your little sweetie pie. Bring it with you on the go for an impromptu playmat at the grandma and grandpa's house.

Sleep Safely, Little One
When putting baby to sleep, “Bare is Best” in the crib. Use a firm, tight-fitting mattress and remove pillows, quilts, comforters, toys and other soft items. For more information about safe sleep, visit www.cpsc.gov

We made it better so you can feel better.
This product is STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX® certified, meaning it is free from harmful levels of chemical substances.
